DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-MS6-L4-10001300-MSSS6-HJD-GBL-02 • MS Social Studies: Grade 6 • Early Civilizations of China

The Bamboo Letter

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What are the students looking at?
2QUESTION 2: What does the girl say she likes about the writing?
3QUESTION 3: What will the students probably do next?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Justify three claims using evidence from the dialogue. First, name the kind of writing and the line that proves it. Second, name what the girl says about the writer's move and the line where she says it. Third, name what the students decide to do and the line where they commit to it.
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5  |  CA HSS 6.6  |  MS Social Studies Grade 6: Early Civilizations of China
